candidates.label: Use the generated image on slide 8
Skip the image; keep the slide text-only

candidates_md:
1. approve — use the image
2. reject — keep text-only
prompt: An illustrative image was generated for the big-idea slide (slide 8). Approve it for the deck, or skip and keep the slide text-only?

options.summary: Use the generated image on slide 8
options.detail: The image is a stylized schematic of a microbial community gradient mapping onto the functional-dark-matter framing. The cost ($0.04) is already spent — approving only places it. It reads as on-topic and metaphor-appropriate, with no embedded text that could leak a downstream finding.

options.summary: Skip the image; keep the slide text-only
options.detail: Discards the generated image and leaves slide 8 as the composed text layout. Choose this if the image feels generic or if a text-only big-idea slide fits the venue better. No further spend either way — the generation already happened.
